title: The Secret Garden of Friendship
moral: True friendship grows when we share our secrets and help each other grow.
moralZh: 真正的友谊，是在分享秘密和互相帮助中成长起来的。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: In a small village, there lived a girl named Lily who loved flowers more than anything. She had a secret garden that no one knew about.

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "My garden is my special place," Lily whispered to herself. "I wish I had someone to share it with, but I'm too shy to make friends."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: One day, a new girl named Mia moved in next door. Mia had big brown eyes and always looked a little lonely.

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "Hello," said Mia softly. "I don't know anyone here. Would you like to play with me?"

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "I... I have something to show you," Lily said nervously. "But you have to promise to keep it a secret."

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "I promise!" Mia said, her eyes lighting up. "I love secrets!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Lily led Mia to the back of her house, through a small gate hidden by vines. Mia gasped when she saw what was inside.

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "It's beautiful!" Mia whispered. "Sunflowers, roses, and daisies everywhere! It's like a rainbow garden!"

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "I grow them all myself," Lily said proudly. "My mom taught me how to take care of plants. She said flowers need love and care, just like people."

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "Can I help?" Mia asked. "I don't know much about gardening, but I really want to learn!"

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "Of course!" Lily said, smiling for the first time. "I have an extra watering can. We can work together."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Every day after school, Lily and Mia worked in the garden. Lily taught Mia about flowers, and Mia told Lily stories about her old home.

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "You know, Lily," Mia said one sunny afternoon, "my mom says that friendship is like a flower. It starts as a small seed, and with care, it grows into something beautiful."

paragraphs.speaker: Lily
paragraphs.text: "You're right," Lily said, looking at their garden. "This garden was lonely before. Now it feels happier with two gardeners."

paragraphs.speaker: Mia
paragraphs.text: "And I was lonely before I met you," Mia said, giving Lily a hug. "Now I have my first real friend in this village!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The garden grew more beautiful than ever. And so did Lily and Mia's friendship. They learned that sharing secrets and helping each other grow makes friendship bloom.
